testcase.name: test_invalid_code_format_returns_400[ab]
testcase.failure: tests/test_creator_codes.py:107: in test_invalid_code_format_returns_400 assert r.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400 for {bad_code!r}, got {r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 400 for 'ab', got 200: {"code_id":"dc_63b620d2c72b","code":"AB","kind":"percent","value":10.0,"event_id":"evt_656b89734cd7","max_uses":null,"uses_count":0,"expires_at":null,"restricted_tiers":[],"active":true,"created_by":"user_926930bed59d","creator_id":"user_2492358084d3","creator_email":"orgtester@allsale.events","creator_name":"OrgTester","commission_percent":null,"admin_created_by":"user_b2cf0afabe69","auto_generated":false,"kind_tag":"creator_promo","created_at":"2026-06-25T23:54:13.825273+00:00"} E assert 200 == 400 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
